forbidden_changes: do not add global survival bonus without progress gating
do not only scale all coefficients
do not treat partial_progress as success_like
required_changes: Remove or gate terminal_reward to prevent rewarding low-quality terminations
Restructure approach_progress to more clearly penalize early_failure trajectories and reward partial_progress
Preserve progress-conditioned gating, low_progress_timeout, leg_bonus, proximity_bonus, near_stability
Ensure any new terminal bonus is stringent (both legs contact, low speed, small angle) to convert partial_progress to success_like

intended_fix: condition reward by progress or stability stage
expected_effect: Handle stage-dependent task conflicts and discourage low-progress survival.
risk: Stage gates may be imperfect before trajectory memory is available.
